description_long: This object consists of two partially squeezed toothpaste tubes, both with metallic-looking bodies and plastic caps. The tubes display a gradient label design that transitions from red at the base to blue at the top, with white text and some small graphics visible. One tube has its cap removed and a generous amount of white toothpaste extruded from the nozzle, while the other tube remains capped. The tubes are slightly crumpled, indicating prior use, and the plastic caps are gray and cylindrical with ridged edges for grip. The overall appearance suggests a standard commercial toothpaste product, likely made of a combination of flexible metal or plastic laminate and plastic components. The tubes are designed to be portable and are commonly found in personal care settings.
description: Two crumpled toothpaste tubes, one with a cap off and white paste extruded, featuring a red-to-blue gradient label and gray plastic caps.
description_view_0: Both tubes are visible, with one cap removed and a large amount of white toothpaste extruded in the foreground.
description_view_1: The tubes are seen from the side, highlighting the crumpled bodies and the open nozzle of the uncapped tube.
description_view_2: The focus is on the open tube with toothpaste extruded, showing the nozzle and the cap placed nearby.
description_view_3: A clear view of both tubes, with the uncapped tube and extruded toothpaste in the foreground and the capped tube behind.
attribute_label_design: Gradient red-to-blue background with white text, no prominent logos, text runs horizontally along the tube.
attribute_tube_orientation: lying horizontally with caps to the right and left, one cap removed and placed nearby
